raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The cup is reachable by the right arm and there is free space on the table to the right/front-right of the cup so it can be displaced without colliding with box_1 or box_2.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is moved away from the front area of the boxes, creating a clear approach corridor to box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The right arm can contact the right side of box_2 without obstruction, and box_2 is in contact/attached to box_1 so it may shift during lifting.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is constrained in place to prevent it from moving or dragging box_1 during the pickup."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "There is sufficient clearance on the left and front side of box_1 for the left end-effector to establish a firm pinch/press grasp without the claw; box_2 is stabilized so the attachment/contact will not cause both boxes to move together.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is securely held by the left end-effector and lifted clear of the tabletop."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Box_1 is already lifted; box_2 remains on the table and may still be in contact with box_1 edges during separation.",
    "Postcondition": "Any residual contact between box_1 and box_2 is safely broken while keeping box_2 stationary; box_1 is fully separated and held in free space."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup is reachable by the right arm and there is free space on the table to the right/front-right of the cup so it can be displaced without colliding with box_1 or box_2.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is moved away from the front area of the boxes, creating a clear approach corridor to box_1.

parsed_json.Precondition: The right arm can contact the right side of box_2 without obstruction, and box_2 is in contact/attached to box_1 so it may shift during lifting.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is constrained in place to prevent it from moving or dragging box_1 during the pickup.

parsed_json.Precondition: There is sufficient clearance on the left and front side of box_1 for the left end-effector to establish a firm pinch/press grasp without the claw; box_2 is stabilized so the attachment/contact will not cause both boxes to move together.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is securely held by the left end-effector and lifted clear of the tabletop.

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_1 is already lifted; box_2 remains on the table and may still be in contact with box_1 edges during separation.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Any residual contact between box_1 and box_2 is safely broken while keeping box_2 stationary; box_1 is fully separated and held in free space.
